overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character swimming underwater through a sunken urban environment. The character explores a seabed with kelp forests, ancient ruins, and a large cylindrical modern building covered in marine growth.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy seabed with scattered marine plants

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily over the sandy ocean floor toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: flat sandy ocean floor with gentle ripples
distant rocky outcrop emerging from the sand

segments.scene_description: The character swims over a wide open sandy seabed with sparse marine vegetation. The environment is calm and clear, with distant rock formations visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater kelp forest with rocky outcrops

events.description: transition from open sandy seabed to dense kelp forest

agents.ego_description: navigating through tall kelp fronds and swimming around rock outcrops

entered.detail: dense forest of tall green kelp fronds swaying in current
large rocky formations covered in marine growth
ancient stone structures partially buried in sand

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense kelp forest with rocky outcrops and ancient stone ruins visible in the distance. The vegetation becomes thick, creating a semi-enclosed environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken ruins overgrown with kelp and coral

events.description: large cylindrical building emerges into view through the kelp forest

agents.ego_description: swimming through dense vegetation and ruins toward the large structure

entered.detail: massive modern cylindrical structure with horizontal stripes covered in marine growth
vibrant red and purple coral formations on the seabed
tall stone pillars rising from the ruins

segments.scene_description: Swimming through dense kelp and ancient ruins, a massive cylindrical building comes into view. The environment is rich with colorful coral and overgrown marine vegetation surrounding the sunken architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior of sunken cylindrical building ascending toward surface

events.description: character begins ascending along the building toward the water surface

agents.ego_description: swimming upward along the curved facade of the building toward the surface

entered.detail: shimmering water surface visible above with light rays penetrating
palm trees growing on top of the submerged building

segments.scene_description: The character ascends along the curved facade of the large cylindrical building, leaving the dense kelp forest behind. The water surface becomes visible above, with palm trees growing on the building's roof, indicating the proximity to the surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that begins on a desolate sandy seabed and ascends toward a lush, sunken architectural marvel. It begins by gliding over a wide, clear expanse of sand with sparse vegetation and distant rock formations. As the camera moves forward, the open space shifts into a dense kelp forest where rocky outcrops and ancient stone ruins create a semi-enclosed environment. The scene then expands to reveal a massive cylindrical building overgrown with colorful coral and marine vegetation, which the character approaches through the ruins. Finally, the camera ascends along the curved facade of the structure, leaving the kelp forest behind as the water surface and rooftop palm trees come into view.
